prestazioni: AE214E 5.2L twin-turbo V12 (AM2) engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with forged Mahle pistons (9.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft by JE Pistons for 950+ HP reliability on E85 fuel. Pair with a custom Manthey Racing ECU flash (Stage 3+) optimizing ignition timing and boost pressure (2.2 bar peak) while retaining OEM torque vectoring.

Garrett GTX5533R turbochargers (hybrid ceramic ball-bearing) with custom 3D-printed Inconel turbine housings by TurboSmart, mated to a secondary water-methanol injection system (Snow Performance Stage 3) for charge cooling. Replace the OEM intercoolers with custom PWR 4.5L bar-and-plate units (50% larger core volume) with billet end tanks for sustained power under track conditions.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) with a carbon-fiber driveshaft by GKN, paired with a Tilton triple-plate ceramic clutch (800 Nm torque capacity) and a 6-speed Graziano transmission tuned with a custom shift kit by OS Giken (0.1s faster shifts). Install a lightweight flywheel by Fidanza (12 lbs) to reduce rotational mass by 40%.
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS DBS Ultimate kit), including extended front fenders (30mm wider), aggressive rear overfenders (50mm wider), and a custom front splitter with integrated canards (Rieger Tuning). Replace the OEM rear diffuser with a 3D-printed titanium unit by 991 Racing, featuring active aerodynamics (adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators).

Custom forged BBS FI-R wheels (20x10.5 ET35 front, 21x12.5 ET40 rear) in a matte gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear). Install a full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović (4.5-inch tips, quad-outlet) with a bypass valve controlled by a Motec PDM15 for on-demand backpressure adjustment.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather (stealth black with red stitching), including a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Replace the OEM seats with carbon-fiber Recaro Pole Position seats (8-way adjustable) and a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, Alcantara grip) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display.
